_comment: Liquid template for Hightouch HTTP Request sync → POST /api/ingest/users — funnel_stage: mau (Habitual MAU). Paste _template into the JSON editor in the sync configuration.
_notes: Replaces docs/hightouch-template-payload.json — avoids | json filters that cause 'Maximum call stack size exceeded' at batch sizes >100.
Set batch size to 100 rows per request (not 1000).
funnel_stage is hardcoded to 'mau' for the Habitual MAU audience.
braze_user_id_latest maps to braze_id — column name from the Hightouch audience model.
external_user_id uses default: '' so empty values fall back to braze_id in the ingest route.
preferred_bible_version_id uses default: 'null' (unquoted) so it renders as JSON null, not the string 'null'.
